task_context.actionable_question: What should I do differently starting next week?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Synthesise all [FE] risk signals into 3–5 prioritised actions. Reference which FE feature triggered each item.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: You are currently showing some signs that may indicate a need for additional support. Your average score is just above the passing threshold, and your engagement score is low, which suggests there are areas to focus on for improvement.

Insights: Average Score Concern: Your average score is 41.25, which is only slightly above the passing threshold of 40. This indicates that you are close to falling below the passing mark, and it may be beneficial to focus on improving your understanding of the material. | Engagement Score: Your engagement score is currently at 0, which suggests that you may not be participating as much as you could be. Increasing your engagement in class activities could help boost your performance.

explanation.summary: You are currently showing some signs that may indicate a need for additional support. Your average score is just above the passing threshold, and your engagement score is low, which suggests there are areas to focus on for improvement.

insights.title: Average Score Concern
insights.description: Your average score is 41.25, which is only slightly above the passing threshold of 40. This indicates that you are close to falling below the passing mark, and it may be beneficial to focus on improving your understanding of the material.

insights.title: Engagement Score
insights.description: Your engagement score is currently at 0, which suggests that you may not be participating as much as you could be. Increasing your engagement in class activities could help boost your performance.

confidence.reason: The data provided is clear and indicates specific areas for improvement.

required_core_outputs.description: Synthesise all [FE] risk signals into 3–5 prioritised actions.
Reference which FE feature triggered each item.

evaluation_constraints.description: Do not include actions that reference signals not present in returned data.
Do not invent risk context, urgency, or priority unsupported by returned feature-engineered signals.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
